description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser merciful metamagic rod 1,500 gp Merciful metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater merciful metamagic rod 12,250 DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that deal nonlethal damage as though using the Merciful Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Merciful Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser merciful metamagic rod 750 gp Merciful metamagic rod 2,750 gp Greater merciful metamagic rod 6,125 gp
